recommendations.title: Armour of God

recommendations.title: Bear Story
recommendations.overview: An old bear goes out every day to a busy street corner. Through a tin marionette theater of his own making, the bear will tell us his life story.

recommendations.title: The Accidental Spy

recommendations.title: Dr. Dolittle 2

recommendations.title: State of Grace
recommendations.overview: Hell's Kitchen, New York. Terry Noonan returns home after a ten-year absence. He soon reconnects with Jackie, a childhood friend and member of the Irish mob, and rekindles his love affair with Jackie's sister Kathleen.

recommendations.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
recommendations.overview: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet—eradicating 'The Syndicate', an International and highly-skilled rogue organization committed to destroying the IMF.

recommendations.title: The House of Yes

recommendations.title: Deliver Us from Evil
recommendations.overview: A retired contract killer goes on a bloody rampage when a young girl finds herself at the mercy of gangland human traffickers and only one man can come to her rescue, with an arsenal of weapons and years of experience in the art of killing.
